content: Run story readiness checks sequentially for stories 34, 35, 36, and 37.

error:
Bash node 'run-queue' failed: Command failed: bash -c set -euo pipefail

mkdir -p "/Users/thomasfey-grytnes/archon-sequential-test/.archon/artifacts/runs/803d7db98e740848ab7234d4d8a70445"
: > "/Users/thomasfey-grytnes/archon-sequential-test/.archon/artifacts/runs/803d7db98e740848ab7234d4d8a70445/run-results.tsv"

while IFS= read -r story_num; do
  [[ -z "$story_num" ]] && continue

  printf 'story\t%s\tstatus\tstarted\n' "$story_num" | tee -a "/Users/thomasfey-grytnes/archon-sequential-test/.archon/artifacts/runs/803d7db98e740848ab7234d4d8a70445/run-results.tsv"

  if archon workflow run user-story-readiness-single --cwd "$PWD" --no-worktree "Review local story #${story_num}"; then
    verdict="$(cat ".archon/story-status/${story_num}/verdict.txt")"
    printf 'story\t%s\tstatus\tcompleted\tverdict\t%s\n' "$story_num" "$verdict" | tee -a "/Users/thomasfey-grytnes/archon-sequential-test/.archon/artifacts/runs/803d7db98e740848ab7234d4d8a70445/run-results.tsv"
  else
    printf 'story\t%s\tstatus\tfailed\tverdict\tfailed\n' "$story_num" | tee -a "/Users/thomasfey-grytnes/archon-sequential-test/.archon/artifacts/runs/803d7db98e740848ab7234d4d8a70445/run-results.tsv"
    echo "Sequential batch stopped because story #$story_num failed." >&2
    exit 1
  fi
done < "/Users/thomasfey-grytnes/archon-sequential-test/.archon/artifacts/runs/803d7db98e740848ab7234d4d8a70445/queue.txt"
